'''Arlo Hirken''' was a native of [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]] who lived in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic's]] fourth millennium. He was a partner of the legendary merchant [[Rin Assid]], and was quite economically and politically ingenious. His exploits would later prove inspirational to one of his descendants, [[Mirkovig Hirken]].

{{Char-stub}}
